description_long: This object is a modern computer monitor with a wide, flat rectangular display framed by a medium-thick, dark bezel with rounded corners. The screen is supported by a robust, angular stand that connects to a circular base, providing stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The base appears solid and slightly elevated, with a two-pronged support arm that attaches to the rear of the monitor. The display itself features a blue-themed screen, suggesting it is powered on or in a demo mode. No physical buttons, ports, or branding are visible on any side of the monitor. The overall design is sleek and minimalistic, suitable for use in offices, kiosks, or public information terminals in urban environments.
description: A sleek, modern computer monitor with a wide display, dark rounded bezel, and a sturdy angular stand on a circular base. The design is minimalistic and functional, with no visible buttons or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide display with a blue screen, framed by a dark bezel and supported by a circular base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the angular support arm and the thickness of the monitor, with the circular base visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the dual-pronged support arm connecting the monitor to the base, with no visible ports or branding.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, showing the angled support and the solid base.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is medium-thick, dark in color, with rounded corners and a smooth, matte finish. It frames the display area evenly on all sides and lacks any decorative elements or color contrast.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a dual-pronged, angular support arm made of sturdy material, connecting the monitor to a solid, circular base. The design is geometric and robust, with no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
